title: Israel kills three in attacks on Lebanon, issues displacement orders for 10 villages
snippet: At least 3 killed in Israeli drone strikes on vehicles in Nabatieh area (Kafr Rumman-Jarmaq highway, Jarmaq-Khardali road). Israel ordered residents of 10 villages to evacuate, citing Hezbollah ceasefire violations. Israeli military spokesman: 'compelled to operate with force.'
tag_reason: New daily update on Lebanon conflict — continued fighting despite extended ceasefire
